source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/공통(CSDT)/[Attachment] 4. Summary of Design Verification and Validation/4.6 PMS/Post-market Surveillance Report .pdf

document.title: Post-market Surveillance Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: PMS report for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW under MDR post-market surveillance requirements.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Summarises results and conclusions of post-market surveillance data gathered under the PMS plan, with rationale and description of preventive and corrective actions taken.
keyPoints: The document is Technical Documentation Document No. A-PMSR-5-001, Rev. No. 1, Rev. Date March 25, 2025.
The product is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model names A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
The report states this is the first PMS Report and that no previously generated PMS report or PSUR existed.
The reporting period for sales and PMS data is May 06, 2024 (Initial CE marking) to December 31, 2024.
The report concludes that no adverse benefit-risk effects were found and no preventive or corrective actions were taken.
The device risk class is Class IIb and the PSUR update period is once in a year.

evidence.claim: The document states there was no previously generated PMS report because this was the first medical device sold to the European market after MDR was implemented.

reviewFlags.reason: The MHRA recall search date range is February 23, 2021 to December 15, 2022, which conflicts with the report's stated PMS period of May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024.
The document discusses notified body submission and availability requirements but does not identify a specific notified body.
